provider: HKUST 2025/26 BEng in Electronic Engineering Major Requirements
note: The official PDF is headed 2026-27 requirements for the 2025-26 intake. This supplement records 34 explicit coded courses across Engineering Fundamentals, Required Courses, Capstone choices and the optional Research Option. The ordinary 21-credit ELEC elective requirement is an open pool of ELEC courses at 3000-level or above, including at least two 4000-level courses and excluding ELEC4940, so it is not expanded into a fabricated closed list. The Research Option also requires advisor-approved Advanced Electives, one PG-level course, ELEC4901 and a UROP course before the thesis; these approval and sequencing rules remain manual checks. ELEC4940 appears only as an excluded course and is not published as an eligible course record. This supplement is bound to the Electronic Engineering Major only and must not be copied to the separate Microelectronics Programme that shares the JS5250 admission entry.
